instruction: A rectangular button or list item labeled "Liked Songs". The visual appearance will vary depending on the music app (e.g., Spotify, Apple Music, etc.), but generally, it will be a text label, "Liked Songs," possibly accompanied by an icon representing a heart or a plus symbol (typically white or the app's accent color). The location is commonly found in the left sidebar navigation menu, the main library view, or within a playlist section. The text will likely be in a readable font size (14-18pt) and the button may have a subtle background highlight on tap. The "Liked Songs" section is usually grouped with other library sections like "Playlists," "Albums," "Artists," or "Downloads".

element.label: The 'Liked Songs' playlist button, located under 'Your Library' in the left sidebar.
